title: 2022 Housing Options at Coastal Carolina University
body: Lived in The Gardens with 4 room mates in 1995; my freshman year at CCU.  We called it the "ghetto".  Seriously it was the best place on campus to live.  Lots of fun in my freshman year!  They've obviously upgraded the heck out of it now.
author: @communityprepper6153

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: thanks for making this, I'm from PA and cant visit colleges (covid 🙄) so ive been watching videos of the colleges im interested in 💕

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: Freshman year and Sophmore year I had a 2.8 gpa because I was lazy and thought because covid I didn’t have to give effort but now I’m taking some honors classes I’m aiming for at least a 3.5 gpa for this year do u think I can get in if this year and next year I maintain a good gpa and continue honors classes

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: Very informative. Thank you. Curious to know if the dorms are musty or moldy? Have you heard of CC having any mold issues in the dorms?
author: @helloeveadams104

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: Hey girl! I’m dying to be in the marine science program I have a 3.6 weighted GPA and I’m taking my ACT and college algebra. The admission counselor I was talking to said as long as I take college algebra and pass I don’t have to submit test scores. Idk I’m stressed and can’t see myself doing anything else or going anywhere else
author: @abbeyn9575

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: I’ll be a Marine Biology major at coastal next year. Did you do SEA housing as a marine science major or not?

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: What do you think my chances are of getting in with a 2.27 weighted gpa and 1010 SAT score. I went to a private school and have a lot of extra curriculars such as; varsity sports, community service, chess club and an internship
author: @quintonfarrell5514

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: So I’m in the Air Force right now but I’m from Myrtle beach and am planning on going to coastal when I get out in January. As a freshman would I have to live in the dorms or do I have the option to live in my own house off base. I’m 21 with already plenty of life experience so I’m really not trying to live in the dorms .
author: @jaketyler3410

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like
body: I'm a Sophomore in hs who really dug myself into a hole freshman year with a 2.3 by the end of the year due to me being lazy cause of Covid. That said I've been bringing it up and should be at a 3.2 by the end of sophomore year and hopefully graduate with a 3.8+ (weighted). I'm not dumb I got a 1090 on my psat but my GPA just isn't great at the moment do you think I can still get into costal?
author: @tristan5544

title: what coastal carolina university is REALLY like

body:

Do you believe the bussiness programs are the best of there programs?
Lastly do you believe the average person could manage the school work while working a part or even full time job?

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: Love you guys! 🫶🏼 At 100K we're going to Hawaii so subscribe if you're new. ROAD TO 100K! LETS GOOO. 🔥

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: I hope everyone enjoyed the palace! I apologize for my speech in the video. I have a speech impediment so talking isn’t the easiest for me. I do the best I can. Go chants!
author: @KyleMcNasty

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: Was a honor to show you guys around the palace! Thank you for having me and Ryan on the channel! It was an absolute blast!
author: @KyleMcNasty

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: Props to the tour guide. It is hard to go on something like social media cause you will never know what people would think
author: @typical-zax

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: Awesome job by the tour guide, people probably don’t take him seriously right away given his speech challenges but he’s obviously genius level and super passionate
author: @mr.thennessen6174

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: Coastal alum here. My completely unbiased opinion is that our baseball field is rivaled by Swayze Field at Ole Miss... and no one else. It's a beautiful facility, amazing campus!
author: @sullysports

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: I remember 2016 like it was yesterday, such an amazing season for Coastal, ever since winning the Natty, things have totally changed including the stadium. Thanks for bringing us along for the tour, go chants
author: @neildorrity9507

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: Wow. These facilities are on par with all the major programs in the country.  Having your own weight room at a mid major school is unbelievable.
author: @JTMont21

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: I live here In Conway so I go to the camps every summer and it’s crazy to think that I have been there and seeing everything on a YouTube video is just crazy to me.
author: @danielkiser9916

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: I was here about a month ago for a random trip for my 17th birthday, instantly feel in love with the school!
author: @AGGIEBO7

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: No idea they won in 2016 and no idea La Stella went there. I’m a former college lacrosse guy and am really falling in love with baseball (Baltimore guy-Orioles’ success is a benefit) minor league, majors and NCAA. Keep up the great videos.
author: @mikestrappelli8098

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: I went to a decent amount of coastal games as a freshman at CCU and didn’t got to the right side of the field but this is the first time I’m seeing the sand pit on the right side. #chantsup

title: Inside the $16,000,000 Coastal Carolina Baseball Facilities!
body: I played for team Rawlings out of Myrtle beach back when I played showcase and this was our home field. Such a fun field to play on
